Class ContextTreeTableModel

java.lang.Object
org.jdesktop.swingx.treetable.AbstractTreeTableModel
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.context.ContextTreeTableModel
All Implemented Interfaces:
TreeModel, org.jdesktop.swingx.treetable.TreeTableModel
public class ContextTreeTableModel extends org.jdesktop.swingx.treetable.AbstractTreeTableModel
A TreeTableModel that provides a hierarchical, JNDI-style view of the entire AI context using unified AbstractContextNodes.

This model is designed for high performance and UI stability. It preserves node identity across refreshes, ensuring that the tree view remains stable (no jumping or collapsing) when the underlying context changes.

It uses a single ContextManagerNode as the root of the hierarchy.

Author:
anahata

    • ContextTreeTableModel

      public ContextTreeTableModel(AgiPanel agiPanel)

  • Method Details

    • refresh

      public final void refresh()
      Refreshes the model's data from the ContextManager and notifies the view of the change.

      Implementation details: It preserves the root node instance if it already exists, triggering a recursive refresh of the node hierarchy.

      To prevent the 'jumping' behavior, it uses identity-preserving nodes and fires a structure change event on the root.

    • refreshTokens

      public void refreshTokens(Runnable onDone)
      Triggers an asynchronous recalculation of token counts for all nodes in the tree. Uses SwingTask to run the calculation pass on a background thread.
      Parameters:
      onDone - An optional callback to run on the EDT after the refresh is complete.

      public int getColumnCount()
